Created attachment 153038
libosmo-netif

Libosmo-netif is library containing common/shared code regarding network interfaces. It's part of Osmocom project regarding open source mobile communications.

% portlint 
looks fine.

% make check-plist

===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
